title: CLAUDE.md (vault-root) runtime body-structure contract
description: Hook-consumable runtime artifact for the vault-root CLAUDE.md body-structure contract. The k8s ValidatingAdmissionPolicy paramKind for the only mandatory vault-root file per Plan 81 SP13 T-13 A1+A2. Authored by SP14 Batch A T-13.1 (2026-05-18) from alignment/claude-md-shape.md §'v3.1 vault-root CLAUDE.md template LOCKED'.

_design_notes.consumer: hooks/pre-write-guard.sh (size cap + section presence) + hooks/post-write-verify.sh (Mustache substitution validation post-install)
_design_notes.evolution_protocol: R-37 atomic lockstep — runtime artifact + template + alignment-lock-record updated in one commit

size_limits.rationale: v3.1 hard cap per Stream G + operator directive (claude-md-shape.md A6).

prohibited_rationale: Per Stream I (T-13 lock A3): hooks read governance bundles from disk directly; CLAUDE.md @import is for Claude's reading context only, not hook function. @import of foundation-master / overlay-master / plans-rules pollutes context without serving runtime enforcement.
